programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Hawaii 5-0
programme.desc: A man claims royal lineage during a combative booking process. After resisting officers and harboring a vicious animal, a man is arrested. Later, intoxicated individuals create havoc for officers.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E14 Flee the coop
programme.desc: An arrested man is caught on camera making a run for freedom. An addict returns to jail and tells officers that meth is controlling his mind. Humility may be the key for one man to quit his life of crime. A shoplifter calls 9-1-1 to help him get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E38 Too Much Drama
programme.desc: A ladies' man smuggles women's underwear into jail. A woman arrested at a traffic accident is incredulous to discover that smoking marijuana while driving is against the law. A young man charged with a DUI tells guards he fears he may become pregnant behind bars.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Phone Fight
programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as “Baby Boy” amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E36 Landlord Attack
programme.desc: An inmate swallows a stash of drugs and then comes down with a case of the munchies. A 72-year-old offers an unusual excuse for dealing drugs to teens at a mall, and a woman charged with assaulting a landlord fakes being sick to get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Hat Thief
programme.desc: Headbutts and aggression abound during a jail fight. A young man is arrested after stealing $1,500 worth of hats. Officers discover a suicidal inmate who’s no longer taking his medication.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E29 Footloose
programme.desc: A secret stash is uncovered during a search at a suspect's property. Two rowdy inmates don't quite hit it off when they invade each other's personal space, and a jaywalker experiences problems keeping his pants from falling down.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Overflowed
programme.desc: An inmate claims to be the victim of an internet scam which led to his arrest. Officers take it easy on a rowdy inmate struggling through a spiritual crisis. Years of prison time can’t sway a young gang affiliate from changing his ways. Prisoners cause plumbing problems to send a message. A mother and daughter bond over being locked up together.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 Pregnant Hooker
programme.desc: A strip search reveals a male inmate in women's lingerie. A couple of puppy thieves get amorous in the bathroom, and a pregnant woman is arrested for solicitation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 I'm Not Jane Doe
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a lewd woman is jailed. In Las Vegas, NV a man is placed in the restraining chair after attempting to bite his own fingers off. In Portland, OR a man is brought in for possession. In Sarasota, FL a homeless man is brought in for trespassing and battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 Bad Luck Hooker
programme.desc: A man brought in for trespassing becomes violent. A sex worker admits she۪s witholding her pediculosis condition from clients. A woman explains her tattoos are a reminder of the women she loved.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 Crushin
programme.desc: A defiant suspect’s behavior takes a turn for the worse after being placed in the restraining chair. A spit mask wearing suspect attempts to procure enhancing supplements from a jail nurse. An intoxicated male suspect swoons for a certain female officer. A local vagrant is taken into custody after attempting to retrieve some things from his ex wife’s house.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Fight For Your Right
programme.desc: A woman is placed into a restraint chair during intake. Punches are thrown and questions are asked after a fight occurs. After dodging a bar tab, a woman is also accused of spiting and biting.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E08 Cousins
programme.desc: A woman is charged with possession of a controlled substance. A woman denies assaulting her husband, and two aggressive cousins threaten police and end up in isolation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 He Said He Said Fight
programme.desc: A code red call blares after a fight occurs in the jail’s dorms. Accused of trespassing, a woman removes her clothes from her holding cell. A man is brought into detox after slamming against a cop car.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Over Cooked
programme.desc: A man arrested on drug warrants is upset about the BBQ brisket he left on the grill. An intoxicated ladies' man flirts with the jail staff and an inmate finds it funny that he sold tree leaves as pot to an undercover officer. Brother turns on brother when a good deed gets mixed with alcohol. A man caught panhandling believes officers should arrest hardened criminals instead of him.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mad-Icidal
programme.desc: Deputies corral a suspect into a cell after serious turmoil. A man becomes suicidal after being brought in on burglary charges. Facing the gavel, a prisoner berates a Judge during court proceedings.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E14 One Too Many Times
programme.desc: A man learns it’s never a good idea to light up a joint next to an active crime scene. An officer encourages a young drug addicted couple to seek treatment. Luck runs out for a tutu-wearing prostitute, and officers pick up an at-risk kid for their 93rd time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Caught On Camera
programme.desc: Two men are found fighting on security cameras. Meanwhile, an impromptu tattoo jail parlor is discovered and shut down. Later, a Russian man and his mysterious friend are excited to be in a U.S. jail.

programme.title: Jail

programme.sub-title: S06 : E10 Sweet as Pie

programme.sub-title: S06 : E12 Housing Fight

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail

In Reno, NV a former marine is taken in to custody for domestic abuse.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Money Buys Justice

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E20 A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
programme.desc: A couple calls for help when a man breaks into their home. A school bus is involved in a hit and run accident. Officer find a one gallon bag of contraband in a suspect’s car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E30 It's Laundry Day
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son’s girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E10 Wake Up Call
programme.desc: A suspicious man decides to take his chances with the wrong end of a taser. A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he’s a good guy. Deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E04 You've Got Mail
programme.desc: During a routine traffice stop, an officer witnesses a cyclist get hit by a motorist. An officer investigates a domestic disturbance call involving some spousal infidelity. Authorities respond to a tip regarding a heavy weight drug dealer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E26 Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: A jaywalker darts on a mad dash through the weeds. Things go badly for a suspect on a stolen motorcycle when choppers help officers track him down. A domestic dispute leads cops to a slew of unexpected crimes.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E25 Taking Flight
programme.desc: A desperate driver is captured by officers after trying to flee on foot. Officers investigate a complaint regarding several intoxicated men soliciting themselves.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E14 Release & Catch
programme.desc: An officer pulls over an erratic driver while on the way to a shots fired call. An officer attempts to stop a resistant motorcyclist. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving an intoxicated man and a woman with warrants.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E14 If the Shoe Fits
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E26 Walk the Line
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from Officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E17 Two Mr. Fix Its
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E02 Rough Walk
programme.desc: Instead of facing the music, a suspect flees from officers down an embankment. A suspect takes a walk through the neighborhood with a BB gun. A innocent pedestrian gets more than she bargained for when she’s hit in a two vehicle collision.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E17 Backseat Denial
programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won’t cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E18 An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck is stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E19 Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are shocked when they recognize a repeat offender. When confronted by the cops, a desperate man shows no love for his girlfriend. Officers bring in a canine unit to complete a vehicle search.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E10 Get Off My Roof
programme.desc: The K-9 unit responds when a gunman takes to the rooftops. A drug exchange goes awry when the dealer tries to ditch his stash. A pickup-driving drunk tries to play it off when he smashes his neighbor's parked car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E03 Mardi Gras Grifter
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. Officers arrest a man pick-pocketing during Mardi Gras.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E07 Boat Guy
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcyclist. A man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother after a boating trip. Police seize a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo from a man.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E03 Take out Orders
programme.desc: Officers investigate a fiasco at a fast food restaurant. A routine pullover results in a drug possession arrest. A vehicular pursuit results in an ill fated foot chase, the suspect is taken to jail for an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E05 Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. Two suspects proclaim their innocence after walking away from a hit and run. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets ‘too friendly’ with a woman in their home.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E35 Borderlands
programme.desc: Officers attempt to detain undocumented people crosssing the border. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E01 Batter Up
programme.desc: After a tow service employee denies a woman her car back, she uses his body for batting practice. A man with a warrant explains his medicinal meth use. No lie is too big for a couple trying to convince officers they didn’t shoplift.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E14 Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A suspect tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E07 Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Officers chase car thieves through town and into the bushes. A friendship crumbles when the cops asks questions. A deputy stops a man who insists that he lets homeless people use his car for storage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E03 Shovel Trouble
programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E31 Carjacked Up
programme.desc: An armed suspect’s bloody state takes officers by surprise. The driver of a stolen car bails when he is pulled over. Officers apprehend several suspects after they spot a pair of carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E29 Apologies Detective
programme.desc: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to a couple arguing on the street. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E19 Runaway
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E08 Poolwatch
programme.desc: Deputies tase a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E01 Fight and Flight
programme.desc: A suspect flees as officers respond to a fight call. A belligerent meth user refuses to cooperate after being pulled over. A cranky husband gets busted for pot after his wife kicks over his Harley.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E11 Candlelight Burglar
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter’s boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E03 Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E26 Pitted Against Each Other
programme.desc: A chase ends after one of the police units disables the vehicle. An officer responds to a domestic dispute between a mother and her son. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with expired tags.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E24 Naked Camping
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself to a couple and the incident is caught on tape. Officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who claims to be camping.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E35 Vampire Woman
programme.desc: A woman tells Officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at Officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E08 Cell Phone Secrets
programme.desc: A high-speed chase ends when the suspect plays chicken with a concrete pole. An emotional man just wants the cops to give him a little kiss. A melee breaks out when a woman seizes her beau's cell phone.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E10 Pickup Pullover
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A bicyclist is charged with possession and public intoxication. A man is pulled over for expired tags.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E05 You're Not Banksy
programme.desc: Officers get a tip and locate the suspect in a recent shooting. A woman is questioned when she is found parked alone in her car behind closed businesses. Officers respond to a call involving juveniles spray painting an electrical box.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E18 Deja Vu
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E20 A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E08 Pinky Promise
programme.desc: A sleeping motorist greets deputies with a foul mood. The cops respond to reports of a suspicious person, only to uncover much more. A young woman tries to promise her way out of a trip to jail.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E20 Bad Behavior
programme.desc: A man runs from Police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E06 Kill ‘Em With Kindness
programme.desc: A belligerent gun-toting man doesn't take too well to some harsh parental criticism. A bike rider tries to outpace a policeman then pretends to be someone else. Officers try to coax a rattled hit-and-run driver into coming clean.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E25 Dark Trailer Park
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E11 A Song of Fire and Cleaning
programme.desc: The pursuit of a criminal driver ends in a fire and police rescue. Police track down an elusive suspect. A family dispute over cleaning a garage ends with the police being called.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E11 Just Hanging Out
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned. Officers search a building in an attempt to thwart a robbery. A frightened woman just can’t keep her cool when stopped by the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E04 Mixed Emotions
programme.desc: A father and son get caught up in a traffic stop gone awry. When a family fight escalates, body parts go flying. A disoriented driver can’t believe his luck when deputies follow him to a gas station.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E05 Call the Manager
programme.desc: An angry customer threatens a store employee with a rock. Officers suspect the ‘medicine’ found in a suspect’s car is actually his business product. A stepfather gets into a fist fight.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E13 Highway to Jail
programme.desc: ATV joyriders lead officers on an unwieldy chase. An attempt to check on some expired tags ends with a couple at gunpoint. A motorist gives deputies his brother’s name in hopes of avoiding jail time.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E23 Pass the Rock
programme.desc: A suspect uses bizarre driving techniques to elude cops. A tough officer wades through a forest of denial before finding the crack. Police search for man accused of shooting up the neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E30 The Short Pursuit
programme.desc: A repeat offender in Las Vegas attempts an ambitious vertical escape. An officer investigates a domestic call involving an armed male suspect. A driver concealing drugs in his mouth eventually swallows the crack cocaine, but comes clean about his possession.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E19 Make it a Large Soda
programme.desc: A motorcyclist refuses to stop for the police and later tries to escape on foot. A pedestrian is found to have a large soda cup full of anything but soda. A man calls for police help when he’s verbally attacked on a city bus.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E02 Who Let the Dogs Out
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police K-9 when a burglary suspect takes refuge in a lemon tree. A suspect on the run seeks shelter in a stranger’s house. A biker with a suspended license just doesn’t know how to listen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E24 Dead End
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia. A man is arrested in a stolen car containing drugs and a firearm.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E05 Scratching Trees
programme.desc: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An Officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.

programme.title: Car Patrol
programme.desc: Wszyscy w Samochodzikowie troszczą się o siebie nawzajem. Patrol to specjalny zespół, który dba o bezpieczeństwo mieszkańców.

programme.title: Carl the Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego transformacje na ratunek! Gdy Samochodzikowo potrzebuje pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: Zespół budowlany buduje Samochodzikowo cegła po cegle! Pokazują, że wszystko jest możliwe z pomocą naszych przyjaciół.

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Poznaj Monster Trucks, ciężko pracujące samochody, które łączą siły, aby pomóc przyjaciołom i mieszkańcom Monster City.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Robo wraz ze swoimi lojalnymi przyjaciółmi chroni Samochodzikowo przed planami Zitrona, chcącego ukraść źródło energii miasta.

programme.title: Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego gadżety na ratunek! Gdy mieszkańcy Car City potrzebują pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Poznaj Toma, wynalazcę z Samochodzikowa! W swoim nowoczesnym laboratorium tworzy wynalazki, aby rozwiązać problemy przyjaciół.

programme.title: Tom's Garage
programme.desc: Tom the Tow Truck pomaga swoim przyjaciołom z Car City, gdy ci potrzebują naprawy. Zawsze daje im coś specjalnego po każdej pracy.

programme.title: Tom's Paint Shop
programme.desc: Zatrzymaj się w warsztacie Toma Holownika! Ten kreatywny malarz z radością ulepszy i nada swoim przyjaciołom nowy, świeży wygląd.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Family Song

programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Episode 3

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Wonderstar Concert

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Hidden
programme.desc: Who doesn't love a surprise? Seafood loving Chef Spencer Watts makes perch and crab the hidden star in tamales, dumplings, spring rolls and poppers.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Salty
programme.desc: Meaty prawns and melt-in-your-mouth cod are on the menu as trendy chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts gets a little "salty" with seafood.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Citrus
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shows how the burst of acidity from lemon, lime, orange and grapefruit adds enticing flavor to mild mahi-mahi and sweet scallops.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Beer and Wine
programme.desc: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts gets casual and formal with monkfish and clam recipes that feature some of his favorite libations - beer and wine.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Nutty
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts is making a cookbook all about fish. Here he cooks up some swordfish and scallop recipes that feature some of his favorite nuts.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Spice
programme.desc: Fish loves spice and Chef Spencer Watts loves fish so he brings the delicious world of spice to halibut and lobster along with some cooling sides.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Herb
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shares some of his favorite mackerel and mussel recipes that highlight aromatic, vibrant and fresh herbs.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boozy
programme.desc: Sturgeon and prawns meet wines and liqueurs in Chef Spencer Watts' kitchen as he brings seafood and booze together in delicious culinary concoctions.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Stuffed
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts dishes on delicious ways to stuff rainbow trout and oysters and how to use them to stuff in a sandwich or even an avocado parcel.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Mixed
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts show us that seafood may be great on its own, but when you bring different kinds together - it makes for some great eating.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Saucy
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts gets saucy with seafood, making a mascarpone sauce and crab sauce for salmon and orange aioli and clarified butter for crab.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Butter
programme.desc: Butter and fish are best friends. Chef Spencer Watts brings bacon butter, brown butter, maple butter and chimichurri butter to this fishy party.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Breaded
programme.desc: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts breaks bread and pastry with Canadian cod and squid to make soup, calzones, and two versions of fried calamari.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Oil
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts makes salmon and prawns pop with flavor as he works with any seafood kitchen's must-have ingredient: delicious flavored oils.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Vinegar
programme.desc: Chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts shows how vinegar, a simple pantry staple, can bring out the flavours of walleye, lobster and crawfish.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Cocktails
programme.desc: Seafood lover and chef Spencer Watts brings the party to the kitchen and shows that cocktails aren't just for drinking, they're also an inspiration for cooking great seafood.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Cold
programme.desc: Cooking doesn't always have to bring the heat. Chef and fish lover Spencer Watts shows you how to prepare cold dishes with arctic char and shrimp.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Wrapped
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts has fun wrapping some of his favourite seafood to create delicious dishes with swordfish and shrimp.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Garlic
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts whips up some garlicky treats with escargot mushroom puff pastry tarts and more.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Seeds
programme.desc: Chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts is all about the often forgotten seeds as he shows how much flavor they can add to sole and squid.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Peppers
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts spices things up in the kitchen as he makes peppERS-inspired dishes with catfish and clams.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Sweet
programme.desc: Satisfy your craving for something sweet with these delicious sablefish and lobster dishes from chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Fast Favs
programme.desc: For a quick and tasty meal, chef Spencer Watts cooks up fast favs using scallops and trout, all done in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Fruit
programme.desc: Chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts mixes the sweet flavours of fruit with fish as he makes dishes with salmon and scallops.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Dairy
programme.desc: Seafood and dairy make the perfect partners. Watch as Chef Spencer Watts creates some dairy-infused dishes using red snapper and scampi.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Tart
programme.desc: Chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts makes tastebuds dance as he creates recipes that combine sour and tart flavours with grouper and clams.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Coffee, Tea
programme.desc: Caffeine isn't just to get you going in the morning. Chef Spencer Watts shows how tea and coffee can add a lot of flavour to tuna and mussels.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 Surf and Turf
programme.desc: Get the best of both land and sea as Chef Spencer Watts creates fun surf and turf dishes featuring halibut and lobster.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Whole
programme.desc: Seafood enthusiast and Chef Spencer Watts shows how easy and incredibly delicious cooking a whole fish or shellfish can be as he makes snapper and crab.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Crusted/Coated
programme.desc: High-energy chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts shows how crusts and coatings add tantalizing texture to rich tuna and fresh, tangy oysters.

programme.desc: Who doesn't love a surprise? Seafood loving Chef Spencer Watts makes perch and crab the hidden star in tamales, dumplings, spring rolls and poppers.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Morels

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Asparagus
programme.desc: Documentary series that follows the amazing journey of an ingredient from its originating source to its final destination.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Cranberries
programme.desc: Millions of pounds of cranberries start their global journey from a Nova Scotia farm. Watch one batch make their way from field to Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Spot Prawns
programme.desc: From the cool clear blue waters of Vancouver to a beachside grill, watch the harrowing journey of a highly sought-after spot prawn.

programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Portugal, Argentina, India, Japan

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Healthy Start
programme.desc: Brunch is the most important meal of the weekend! Join host Vanessa Gianfrancesco as she whips up healthy and delicious recipes that'll awaken your taste buds.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Pancake Brunch
programme.desc: Pancakes are a classic brunch staple, but host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up her twist on this traditional dish with savoury, sweet and crunchy recipes.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Champagne Brunch
programme.desc: Champagne, lobster, and homemade scones, oh my! Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up an indulgent and luxurious brunch that's perfect for those fabulous mid-mornings.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Pick Up Your Brunch
programme.desc: Skip the utensils and gather for chef Vanessa's pick up your brunch! Featuring Sticky Pull-Apart Praline Bread and an extra cheesy Monte Cristo Sandwich.

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Creamy
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on creamy sauces! First a duo of creamy butter sauces with salmon! Next up a sauce créme with beef tenderloin and a vegan coconut créme anglaise!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Savoury
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on savoury sauces! First up, a soy-miso-honey sauce for seared duck breast! Next, a black demi-glace for hanger steak and a sauce duxelles for scallops!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Spice
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on spicy sauces! First up, a Cajun comeback sauce for soft-shelled crab! Next, a classic steakhouse mustard sauce and a ginger caramel sauce for ginger caramel apples!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Wine
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on wine sauces! First up, a classic veal marsala! Next, a white wine chicken gravy and a port sabayon with grapes!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Scotland, France, USA, Myanmar
programme.desc: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Scotland, France, the USA, and Myanmar!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Turkey, Honduras, China, Nigeria
programme.desc: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Turkey, Honduras, China, and Nigeria!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Lebanon, Mexico, Greece, UK
programme.desc: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Lebanon, Mexico, Greece, and the UK!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Italy, USA, Ukraine, Portugal
programme.desc: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates veggie dishes inspired by Italy, the USA, Ukraine, and Portugal!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Up All Night Brunch
programme.desc: Have you been up all night? There's a brunch for that! Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four decadent recipes including an indulgent Breakfast Poutine and chocolate Stuffed French Toast.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 French Brunch
programme.desc: Inspired by flaky, buttery, and chocolatey dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la!

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks her way from Monday to Friday with four delicious dishes, including a Roast Beef feast and velvety Earl Grey Pudding.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Sicily
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled...

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Italian Brunch
programme.desc: Inspired by the culture closest to host Vanessa Gianfrancesco's heart, join her for Italian brunch recipes that will have you saying Mama Mia!

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Spaghetti & Meatballs
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Spaghetti and Meatballs! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: One BIG Recipe
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Surf and Turf
programme.desc: What on earth and/or sea is super fun host Kim Lallouz cooking this week for her One Big Recipe? You guessed it - Surf and Turf! First on the beach are her Singapore-inspired Chili Crab Cakes, redolent with southeast Asian aromatics and spices like lemongrass, ginger, and galangal. 'Turf's up' next with a fresh off-the-hoof Marrow Toast plate decked out with melty marrow, crispy crostini, and garlicky parsley salad. We all deserve a creamy cheesy break (right?), so of course Risotto Carbonara with Crispy Pancetta and Enoki Mushrooms follows. Braised Veal Osso Bucco is the big deal main course, all shored up surfingly with scrumptious Seared Scallops and smoky Grilled Broccoli Rabe!

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Oil
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts makes salmon and prawns pop with flavor as he works with any seafood kitchen's must-have ingredient: delicious flavored oils.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Vinegar
programme.desc: Chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts shows how vinegar, a simple pantry staple, can bring out the flavours of walleye, lobster and crawfish.

programme.title: AMSR U Hungry
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Big Breakfast
programme.desc: Dive into a sensory feast with ASMRU HUNGRY: Big Breakfast, a show where a hearty meal of ham, sausage, eggs, tomato, baked beans, toast, hash browns, and coffee take center stage in an auditory experience like no other. Whether you're seeking relaxation, focus, or just a moment of pure indulgence, this comforting show will leave you craving more.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Cold
programme.desc: Cooking doesn't always have to bring the heat. Chef and fish lover Spencer Watts shows you how to prepare cold dishes with arctic char and shrimp.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Fresh Pasta
programme.desc: Italian chef and food guru Vanessa Gianfrancesco teaches us how to make fresh pasta like an Italian, and then uses that pasta to create everything from fettucine alfredo to tortelloni to lasagna bianca.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Japanese Comfort Food
programme.desc: It's all about comfort food as Japanese-German chef and cookbook author Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen fixes up chicken hotpot, chicken skewers, meat and potato, and a sweet custard.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Thai Street Food
programme.desc: Thai chef Pailin Chongchitnant shows us the secrets behind Bangkok's famous street food with pork skewers, noodle soup, five-spice pork belly soup, and pandan coconut custard fondue.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Brunch
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make brunch for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: blackberry açai smoothie bowls, French toast bread pudding, and Lyonnaise salad with bacon and poached eggs!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make hamburgers with sides and dessert for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: smash burgers, pickle slaw, matchstick fries, and strawberry chocolate milkshakes!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Turkey + Indonesia
programme.desc: Turkey, think Silk Road spices. Indonesia, lots of seafood and tropical fruits! Curious and adventurous host Bianca Osbourne is your CombiNATION Plates culinary guide through both food cultures. First, check out Turkish Spice Crusted Lamb Rack with yogurt and blistered peppers. Next, an Indonesian tribute: Crab Leg with Coconut Curry. For the 'common ingredient'? Two takes on tender, savoury eggplant! Turkish Eggplant is braised and served with parsley and feta and the Indonesian take is served with fried garlic and sweet soy. For the CombiNATION Plate? Peanut- chili Sate sauce replaces walnut for Pazili TrancÌ§a, a classically Turkish halibut presentation, also served here with unique,...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Canada + Greece
programme.desc: From Canada to Greece, CombiNATION Plates always covers lots of ground! Kicking off, host Bianca Osbourne wows with ubERS-Canadian Roasted Venison Loin, yummy Fiddlehead Pancakes and sweet-tart Cranberry sauce. Next, enjoy a scenic Mediterranean vacation on a plate with her completely new approach to Greek Salad, taken up a notch or two with tasty seared Albacore Tuna! This episode's 'common ingredient' is lamb shank; check out two wildly creative re- inventions; first, of Canadian TourtieÌ€re, and then, Greek Dolmades. For a final recipe, a dessert fit for a lumberjack or a Greek god! Oka Saganaki with McIntosh Apple Butter and Maple Loukoumades; made with nutty Canadian Oka cheese,...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Mexico + Norway
programme.desc: In this episode of CombiNATION Plates, host Bianca Osbourne starts in Mexico with her version of popular street snack, 'Esquites', re-invented here as sweet corn flan. Next is Norway, don't miss explosively exciting quick-smoked Arctic Char with Forage, you've NEVER seen anything like this before. The common ingredient is tacos! From Norway, 'Lefse' is a potato-flour 'tortilla' served with fresh berries and uniquely Scandinavian 'Brunost' cheese. Representing Mexico, check out spicy pork and pineapple 'Tacos al Pastor'. The Big Dish is Lamb Pinnekjott with Birch Bark Tamale, lamb ribs are seasoned, birch bark is stuffed with masa and veggies, both are steamed over birch branches and boozy...

programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Cake
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular cake recipes, from hosts like Siobhan Detkavich and Michael Bonacini.

programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular cornbread recipes, from hosts like Natalia Machado and Spencer Watts.

programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik put their heads together to design a three-course menu, highlighting the gifts of the forest! Mushrooms, venison, cranberries, and – of course – black forest cake!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Middle Eastern Brunch
programme.desc: What do they eat for brunch in the Middle East? Friendly host Vanessa is excited to show you with these tasty recipes!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Georgia + Hong Kong
programme.desc: Join Bianca Osbourne to taste and combine! Fun CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne starts this episode with an inspired tribute to Georgian cuisine; Beef Tartare with Tkemali (sour plum sauce), marigold powder, and tart, crunchy pickles. Next; feast your eyes on her unique Hong Kong dumpling: plump scallops, pork, and veggies are blended, rolled, steamed, sliced, and then served with Crispy Yu Choy and XO. The common ingredient is rabbit! Georgia offers up Rabbit 'Mtsvadi', grilled and glazed with pomegranate reduction. Hong Kong represents with Sweet and Sour Rabbit, Grilled Pineapple and Red Pepper Coulis. Finally, Georgian Milk Braised meets Chinese/Hong Kong-style Roast Duck with...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 South Korea + Spain
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne is always looking for the best food in the world to share. The first stop is South Korea with her Sesame Crusted Tuna 'Yukhoe', a delicious blend of favourite Korean flavours. Next stamp on the passport? Spain! Mouth-watering Duck Breast is seared and served rare with a crispy artichoke heart, membrillo, olives, and sweet-savoury sherry reduction. Beef short ribs are the common ingredient with Catalonian Braised and Romesco to one side and sticky Korean Kalbi-style grilled to the east! For the topper, drool over Bulgogi Octopus simmered and served with saffron-scented Sticky Rice Paella cakes, finished with crispy Paprika-Gochujang battered mussel....

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Ethiopia + Brazil
programme.desc: Travel the world without ever leaving the kitchen! Intrepid host of CombiNATION Plates, Bianca Osbourne, starts this episode with Ethiopian inspired Berbere Spiced Quail, seared in aromatic Niter Kibbeh, and served with crunchy-sour Gomen Salad. Brazil is next, check out this re- invention of Feijoada... with braised and seared pork belly, oranges, crema, and fresh black bean salsa. Common ingredient 'Coffee and Sweets' is next... with java-spiked Injera Crepe Cake for Ethiopia and Brazil blending up a dark roast of rich, coffee-spiked, chocolatey Brigadeiros truffles. The final plate is Coconut Crusted Black Cod with cheesy Brazilian-style Pao de Queijo bites, and teff flour a brush of...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Morocco + Thailand
programme.desc: Join CombiNATION Plates host Bianca Osbourne for a trip to Morocco and Thailand! First up, whole Red Snapper is rubbed with earthy Ras el Hanout spice, poached in argan oil, and served with char-grilled oranges. Thailand inspires the next plate; Chicken Thigh 'Lollipop', roasted and served with bamboo shoots, chilies, and sauced with peanut-coconut red curry. Next, these countries both love Spring Rolls... Morocco's version, Briouat, is stuffed with saffron couscous and fresh cheese and fried... from Thailand comes a salad roll with shrimp and mango, dipped in a fiery green Nam Jim. Stick around for the big dish - Saffron buttERS-basted beef Striploin, served with complex Apricot-Green...

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Wrapped
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts has fun wrapping some of his favourite seafood to create delicious dishes with swordfish and shrimp.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Garlic
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts whips up some garlicky treats with escargot mushroom puff pastry tarts and more.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Seeds
programme.desc: Chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts is all about the often forgotten seeds as he shows how much flavor they can add to sole and squid.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Peppers
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts spices things up in the kitchen as he makes peppERS-inspired dishes with catfish and clams.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Italy's love affair with the tomato
programme.desc: The humble tomato - called the pomodoro, or 'apple of gold' in Italy - is the star of this episode as Chef Vanessa Gianfrancesco creates a rustic appetizer, two iconic mains, and even a dessert using tomatoes!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Yoshoku: Japanese recipes inspired by Western cuisine
programme.desc: Chef and cookbook author Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen makes Japanese Yoshoku dishes - recipes that are inspired by western cuisine, from spaghetti to croquettes to hamburgers and a creamy seafood bake.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Sweet and sour are definitely on the menu as Thai-born chef Pailin Chongchitnant whips up glass noodle salad, sour curry, sweet and sour stir fry, and pineapple and lychee in iced syrup.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Breakfast of Champions
programme.desc: Morning meals take center stage as griddles bring new energy to breakfast classics. Pancakes, bacon, and hash browns transform with bold ideas from home kitchens, turning the first meal of the day into something truly special.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Smashburger Showdown
programme.desc: Smashburgers take the spotlight as the show dives into their crispy, caramelized history and the techniques that made them iconic. Home cooks share their own griddle versions full of personality and flavor, inspiring new ways to press, sear, and stack this all-time favorite.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Craving Vegan
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Craving Vegan by Sam Turnbull! Follow along as Shahir prepares vegan white lasagna, jackfruit pulled pork, tofu tikka masala, and much more!

programme.title: Israel Now News
programme.desc: The correspondents highlight news surrounding the nation of Israel, covering everything from current events and politics to social issues and much more.

programme.title: Land of the Bible
programme.desc: Expert guides and scholars bring Israel's Biblical history to life through ancient sites, archaeological discoveries, and modern developments.

programme.title: The Jewish Jesus
programme.desc: Rabbi Schneider uncovers the final lessons Jesus gave His disciples in the days leading up to the cross and how they speak directly to everyday struggles.

programme.title: The Narrow Way
programme.desc: Offering biblical teaching that addresses the spiritual battles you face Mike Signorelli provides practical guidance for walking in freedom through Christ.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit.

programme.title: Dr. Robert Jeffress - Pathway to Victory
programme.desc: Pastor of First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas, and author Dr. Robert Jeffress offers practical and inspirational applications for today's society.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection with Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin presents life-changing, sensible messages, including dramatic plays, musical acts and commanding storytelling with the Gospel.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving in to their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Tullow, with Tom and Lisa who want to renovate their 19th century farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Yvonne and John live in a housing estate in Dundalk with their two children. Four years ago, they decided to buy their next-door neighbours house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jim and Siobhan Doyle live in a beautiful old house over looking Dublin Bay in Sutton. See Dermot Bannon transform the rambling old house into a beautiful new space.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The series begins in Cork City with our youngest and most ambitious couple yet, Meadhbh and Niall, both 27-years-old.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: No close neighbours, beautiful views of the Wicklow Mountains, a large vegetable patch, 10 hens, four ducks, two geese, four beehives, two dogs and three cats.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marcus and Margaret are about to extend a two-bed cottage in Dundrum and share it with Marcus's beloved Aunt May.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The number one criteria when buying a house is location and our fifth programme of the series is set in one of the most sought after costal parts of the country, Dalkey.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: John Rochford from Dublin and Lee Benn, originally from Limerick, have bought a house in their dream location - South Dublin's seaside suburbia, Blackrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a family to transform their 70s bungalow outside Tipperary into a modern family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot goes to Cork to work with a family spanning three generations - who all have different ideas on how to improve their home.

programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon tries to turn a dilapidated, woodworm infested 1930s cottage into a starter home for a Finglas family.

programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot tackles a large Victorian terraced house in the highly sought-after Dublin suburb of Donnybrook.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 Room to Improve

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Czech Republic Kutna Hora
programme.desc: The ancient silver mining town of Kutná Hora was the second most important town in the medieval Kingdom of Bohemia after Prague. Rohan Patoley learns about the erstwhile glories of the town at the former royal mint, the Italian court, and soaks in the romance of the quaint winery, Vinné Sklepy. He also attends the Royal Silvering Festival, an annual Gothic celebration recalling the town’s rich past.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Moroccon Chronicles Eternal Love in Chefchaouen
programme.desc: Rafe visits Chefchaouen and is instantly besotted with the city, much to the confusion of the locals who are baffled by his eccentricities.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Quest Rewa, India
programme.desc: Be it recipes that evolved from hunting or dishes that were prepared as offerings to god, Alex uncovers the secrets of royal Bagheli cuisine.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Xp Guide Wayanad
programme.desc: Wayanad, a bucolic town in Kerala, offers an itinerary full of wildlife, ayurveda, plantations and spas.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Off The Grid Lope National Park, Gabon
programme.desc: Emeline puts on her adventurous garb as she strolls around the gorgeous rainforest and savanna of Lope National Park.

programme.title: Viajar Mexico
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Viajar Mexico Ciudad De Mexico
programme.desc: Enter Charlie Rubio: a bona fide Mexican, who is here to reveal all the wonderful things that make Mexico his favorite place in the world.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Czech Republic Pilsen
programme.desc: Pilsen boasts of a majestic Baroque town square and magnificent Gothic churches but to the world, it will always be known as the birthplace of the world’s first and arguably best lager beer, Pilsner Urquell. Rohan Patoley takes the tour of the most famous brewery at the town that has been practicing the art of brewing beer over 700 years.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 The Moroccon Chronicles The Ballad of Fes
programme.desc: The imperial city of Fes, with its richly evocative attractions, makes Rafe feel like he is in a movie...with a plot twist right around the corner.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Quest, Jorhat
programme.desc: From chicken with bamboo shoots to a banana stem dish called Posola Musar Ali Khan, Alex learns to make some popular dishes of Assam.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Xp Guide Colombo, Sri Lanka
programme.desc: A place where sounds of the calming shores collides endlessly with that of an urbane environment and lives shuttle between the beaches.

programme.title: Off The Grid Libreville, Gabon
programme.desc: The capital of Gabon, Libreville offers an off the grid route to the host Emeline. From the scenic trails of Pongara National Park to exciting beach experiences, Libreville comes across as a pleasant surprise. But what’s more exciting is watching a number of sea turtles making their nests and hatching eggs near the beach. Emeline’s quest also leads her to a tête-à-tête with a conservationist where she learns about saving turtles.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 Backpack, Egypt Cairo
programme.desc: Sabrina starts her backpacking journey in Egypt from the capital Cairo, evenly painted in the shades of ancient islamic and modern architecture.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Czech Republic Karlovy Vary
programme.desc: Legend has it that Karlovy Vary was founded by the Czech king and Roman emperor Charles IV, who discovered a unique spring here while hunting deer one evening. This historic spa town in Czech Republic is known for the healing power of its thermal springs. Rohan explores a few of them including the Freedom and Rusalka Springs and understands their significance to the town.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Moroccon Chronicles One Flew Over Casablanca
programme.desc: At Casablanca, Rafe draws hilarious connections between what he sees, and the 1942 Hollywood classic named after the city.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Quest, Nagaland
programme.desc: While learning to prepare a Naga pork delicacy, Alex gets an understanding of the different dishes and cooking styles of Nagaland’s tribes.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Quest, Nagaland_Shillong(Eng)
programme.desc: Alex's journey continues in Northeast India, where she visits Shillong, home to people like Allen, who are striving to keep traditional dishes alive.

programme.title: Xplore Czech Republic
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Xplore Czech Republic Cesky Krumlov
programme.desc: Situated on the banks of the Vltava river, Český Krumlov is a fine example of a European medieval town. Rohan witnesses the Gothic, Renaissance and Baroque elements of the stunning State Castle, which dominates the city. He also finds out about the unconventional life and work of the world-famous painter, whose art was once inspired by this fairytale town in mysterious ways.

programme.title: Kissed By the Sea

programme.desc: Tara explores Vallettand Vittoriosa town, visiting historical monuments, Barraka Garden, Grand Harbour and learning about Catholic influence on Malta.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Moroccon Chronicles Uncharted Marrakech
programme.desc: The evocative city of Marrakech has long provided great artists with inspiration, but will it be able to give Rafe the adventure he seeks?

programme.title: Backpack Alexandria, Egypt
programme.desc: Sabrina explores Alexandria, a perfect amalgamation of modern culture and traditional arts. She visits the Royal library, Citadel and the grant Luxor temple and later tries traditional Arabic delicacies.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Quest, Nagaland_Shillong(Eng)

programme.desc: Tara explores Vallettand Vittoriosa town, visiting historical monuments, Barraka Garden, Grand Harbour and learning about Catholic influence on Malta.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Moroccon Chronicles Uncharted Marrakech
programme.desc: The evocative city of Marrakech has long provided great artists with inspiration, but will it be able to give Rafe the adventure he seeks?

programme.title: Backpack Alexandria, Egypt
programme.desc: Sabrina explores Alexandria, a perfect amalgamation of modern culture and traditional arts. She visits the Royal library, Citadel and the grant Luxor temple and later tries traditional Arabic delicacies.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia

Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bhutan Paro
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bhutan Thimpu
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 World Heritage Ancient Temples of Egypt, Egypt (ENG)
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bhutan Phobjikha
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Backpack Sjenica, Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind

programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Food Fact Fun Dubai 2

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 XP Guide, Stockholm
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide

programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.
